texto: I may not be the number one movie star, or my films might not be doing too good. I am grateful for what life has offered me. texto: It's not okay to be fat - not because of the way you look, but because it's unhealthy. I have experienced hormonal problems, bad skin, immense laziness, and back and knee pain.
